creator: listat2018@apz.fi
text:
Selecting not to build USB support in "make config" makes the package fail at installation as it appears to expect the files from USB drivers to be present:

===>  Installing for nut-2.7.2
===>  Checking if sysutils/nut already installed
===>   Registering installation for nut-2.7.2
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/sysutils/nut/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/nut/nutdrv_atcl_usb): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/sysutils/nut/work/stage/usr/local/libexec/nut/riello_usb): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/sysutils/nut/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/blazer_usb.8.gz): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/sysutils/nut/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/nutdrv_atcl_usb.8.gz): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/sysutils/nut/work/stage/usr/local/man/man8/riello_usb.8.gz): No such file or directory
*** Error code 74
